name: Sweet Squash Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the whole squash in a microwave oven and cook on high power for 8 minutes.
2. Peel the squash and cut into cubes. (If you don't have a microwave oven, this step may be omitted; it simply makes the squash easier to peel and cut up.)
3. Place all of the ingredients in a large soup pot and simmer over medium-low heat for 45 minutes.
4. Transfer the soup to a blender or food processor, processing in batches until smooth and creamy.
